_comment: SYNTHETIC golden fixture — the reflection agent's expected output shape for examples/sample-entry.md. Validated by tests/test_reflection_schema.py.

thought_record.situation: Overrode own risk rule (half size after two losses) on a valid setup; the trade failed and erased most of the week's gains.
thought_record.automatic_thought: I need to make back the losses before the close.
thought_record.evidence_for: The loss was real and the size made it larger than it needed to be.
thought_record.evidence_against: The setup itself was valid; the rule that would have contained the damage already exists and has worked before.
thought_record.balanced_thought: The system did its job — it flagged the exact moment of risk. The work is following it when it matters most.

one_observation: The override happened at the intersection of drawdown and time pressure — same conditions as the rule was written for.
one_question: What would have to be true for 'make it back today' to stop feeling urgent?
